name: @chimeranext/geospatial-core
description: Satellite/aerial land-use AI service (Python). Thin Turbo passthrough — real scripts delegate to native tooling (uv / rasterio / h3).

scripts.build: echo '[geospatial-core] build delegated to native tooling (uv / hatchling) — see openspec change 2026-06-01-geospatial-core'

scripts.lint: echo '[geospatial-core] lint delegated to native tooling (ruff / mypy) — see openspec change 2026-06-01-geospatial-core'
